svg.text:
A jump through platform is a new type of ground that you can walk upon, but also can be jumped up or dropped down through by the player. It can be suprisingly hard to get the player / scripts to behave themselves exactly as I would like! To achieve the two platform types I have added a second sprite called 'Platforms' that contains the orange drop through platforms, and I updated the touching scripts to look for touches with both ground, and platforms. However, the changes are not quite so trivial and I think it is probably beyond the scope of
this format of tutorial to explain them so I might break this up now into a new tutorial going forward. You can see the scripts for this sprite in "12.JumpThroughPlatforms".
